channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Lessons in sustainability: What colleges can teach workplaces
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Honghao Deng, Fast Company

item.title: Neudesic launches in Australia in a bid to speed up AI adoption for IT teams
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) has gained significant traction among business leaders keen to explore ways it can drive operational efficiencies and cost savings. But while top leadership is sold on its potential, it’s a different tale for IT teams working the ground.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Australia's AI Challenges: A Roadmap to Success
item.description: Australia's business leaders are keen on leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) for operational efficiencies and cost savings, but the challenges of implementation are pronounced. Learn how Neudesic is helping organisations overcome these obstacles and drive success with AI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Alexa’s big AI revamp might have been delayed again, and I’m losing faith Amazon's new assistant will be all that smart
item.description: Alexa’s big AI revamp may have just been delayed, again – and it sounds like Amazon’s assistant is getting dumber rather than smarter.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Links to Signal messaging platform not working on X
item.description: Users on Elon Musk's social media platform X were not able to share or post links to the encrypted messaging app Signal on Monday and were greeted with various failure notifications when they tried to do so.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Top Greek scientist says the Santorini earthquake outlook remains uncertain
item.description: Greece’s chief seismologist says that while earthquake frequency around Santorini has slightly decreased, the situation remains unpredictable for the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Court ban on Google AI stakes would hurt Anthropic clients, say analysts
item.description: Anthropic has asked a US court for permission to intervene in the remedy phase of an antitrust case against Google, arguing that the US government’s call for a ban on Google investing in AI developers could hurt it.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google TV just lost some more of its free streaming channels, but it's not all bad news
item.description: Google TV Freeplay has lost some seasonal Christmas channels and regained two briefly-absent channels instead.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra and S25 Plus have a charging issue – here’s the solution
item.description: Samsung's 45W charger is causing issues for some Galaxy S25 Plus and Galaxy S25 Ultra users, but a fix is on the way.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: GenAI can make us dumber
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) tools based on deep learning are quickly gaining adoption, but their use is raising concerns about how they affect human thought.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Want a Blu-ray writer and a 13th-generation Intel Core CPU in your laptop? There's only one place on Earth for it
item.description: Dynabook and NEC revive optical drives in modern laptops, blending nostalgia with high-performance processors, high-res displays, and advanced connectivity.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How cyberscams are draining Americans wallets by the billions
item.description: Scams cost Americans an estimated $159 billion every year and average about $3,500 in losses per victim. The CyberGuy has advice to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A ‘true crime’ YouTube channel’s videos got millions of views. It turns out the stories were AI-generated
item.description: A popular “true crime” YouTube channel has been pulling in millions of views with videos about gruesome murders. As it turns out, none of them are real.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: She helped create the U.S. Digital Service. Now it’s become the U.S. DOGE Service
item.description: As former U.S. Deputy Chief Technology Officer, Jen Pahlka helped to create the U.S. Digital Service (USDS). Today, the USDS houses Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), hell-bent on quick, disruptive change.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Your new Android notification superpower
item.description: It may seem like a paradox, but notifications are both the best and the worst part of owning an Android device. On the one hand, notifications let us stay on top of important incoming info — be it a critical Slack message, a personal family text, or an email from a high-priority client or colleague.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, ABC 4
